summary.what: Introduced the Working Mill theme for Timbermill
summary.why: The neutral baseline was readable but did not give Timbers a distinctive brand experience or demonstrate the capture-to-report transformation visually.
summary.how: Reworked the Eleventy templates and CSS around a generated industrial hero, self-hosted Geologica typography, a small licensed icon system, responsive artifact rows, quiet report surfaces, dark mode, and reduced-motion-safe CSS effects.

notes: Kept the static host-neutral publishing contract and avoided a general theme engine. The neutral theme remains recoverable in Git history; runtime theme selection can wait for a second real consumer.
